name: Novavax, Inc.
description: Novavax, Inc. is a biotechnology company that promotes improved health globally through the discovery, development, and commercialization of innovative vaccines to prevent serious infectious diseases. The company utilizes a differentiated vaccine platform that combines a recombinant protein approach, innovative nanoparticle technology, and its proprietary Matrix-M adjuvant to enhance the immune response. Headquartered in the United States, Novavax focuses on addressing global health needs by creating vaccines that are designed to be stable and accessible, aiming to protect populations against a wide range of infectious threats.
